[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010101 3
1 11010001 4
2 00010111 4
3 00000010 1
4 00000110 2
5 10001111 5
6 11011111 7
7 01111111 7
